topViolations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.67 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3b82f6, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

topViolations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
